{{Quote|It takes a special breed of hunter to nab a Jedi, and the Seps aren't too demanding since they're not asking for live prisoners. You got to watch your back and strike from a distance, or else you'll end up getting Jangoed.|Urzan Krag on how to defeat a Jedi|<ref name="CIS Shadowfeed Dispatch 15:01:15 Edition">{{InsiderCite|73|CIS Shadowfeed Dispatch 15:01:15 Edition}}</ref>}}
'''Urzan Krag''' was an [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who worked for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]]. He tried to kill [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], but the young boy destroyed Krag's ship in a space battle.

{{Char-stub}}
